description_long: This is a stylish white boater hat featuring a wide, flat brim and a flat-topped crown with a subtle crocodile-embossed texture. The hat is adorned with a distinctive band in white, green, and red, accented by a gold trim and a gold circular logo at the front. The band wraps seamlessly around the crown, providing a bold contrast to the white base. The surface of the hat appears smooth with a slight sheen, suggesting a high-quality finish. The overall design is elegant and modern, suitable for upscale urban environments. The hat's structure is firm, maintaining its shape while offering a comfortable fit.
description: A white boater hat with a crocodile-embossed texture, wide flat brim, and a green-red-white band with gold trim and a front gold logo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gold logo centered on the white, green, and red band, with the wide flat brim and embossed texture clearly visible.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the continuous band and the hat's flat-topped crown, with no visible logo.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the uninterrupted band and the full width of the brim, with the crown's flat top prominent.
description_view_3: Side angled view showing the band and brim, with the gold logo not visible from this angle.
